data.title: Global instant noodles market to reach USD 48.5 billion by 2033, growing at a 6.5% CAGR due to urbanization and changing consumer preferences.
data.description: The instant noodles market is experiencing strong growth globally, fueled by factors such as increasing urbanization, higher disposable incomes, and a shift in consumer preferences towards convenient meal options. The market is benefiting from a growing working-class demographic and busy lifestyles, resulting in continued high demand for instant noodles. This trend is reflected in the market's consistent expansion, with significant numbers of consumers opting for quick and easy meal solutions.

data.title: SCANGRIP launches 3 new Danish-made work lights in North America, improving job site safety and efficiency.
data.description: Top-of-the-line lighting solutions from SCANGRIP are enhancing safety and productivity at job sites. The reputable manufacturer from Europe has launched three innovative LED work lights in the North American market. The latest products, AREA 10 CONNECT, NOVA 10, and PROBE 10, offer state-of-the-art illumination for professionals seeking improved visibility. The release comes amid growing demand for high-quality lighting equipment, with SCANGRIP leading the industry. These advancements are set to elevate job site efficiency with cutting-edge technology.

data.title: Hong Kong welcomed Chinese New Year with sponsored Year of the Horse Fireworks Display on Feb 18, 2026.
data.description: On February 18, 2026, in Hong Kong, the Chinese New Year was joyfully welcomed with the grand "Prosperity Gallops Across Hong Kong" Year of the Horse Fireworks Display. The event was made possible thanks to the exclusive sponsorship from The Hong Kong Jockey Club. The celebration attracted a large crowd in the city and marked the beginning of the new year with dazzling fireworks lighting up the sky. The event showcased the rich cultural traditions of Hong Kong and brought together numerous individuals to witness the spectacular display in honor of the Year of the Horse.

data.title: The RealReal reopens SF store on Feb 26 at 11:00 a.m. for luxury shopping and consignment services.
data.description: On February 26th at 11:00 a.m., The RealReal will be reopening its Union Square location in San Francisco. The store will offer luxury shopping opportunities along with expert consignment services.
CNH ranks in the top 1% of S&P Global's 2026 Sustainability Yearbook.

data.title: Vishay Intertechnology releases AEC-Q200 qualified 0201 chip resistors for automotive, industrial, and telecom apps.
data.description: Compact devices offer efficient space utilization and strong dependability across automotive, industrial, and telecommunications sectors. These gadgets streamline operations without compromising reliability.

data.title: Sysco launches Home Grown pilot program in 3 U.S. regions, includes Canada. Initiative focuses on locally sourced foods.
data.description: Sysco Corporation, a renowned food distribution leader based in Houston, announced on February 18, 2026, the launch of a new initiative called Home Grown by Sysco. This program aims to introduce locally sourced foods and artisan products to a wider audience. The pilot program is set to cater to various customers and communities, highlighting the company's commitment to promoting regional products.

data.title: Scripps appoints Oliver Gray as VP, network sports and client partnerships to boost connection with advertisers.
data.description: Oliver Gray has been appointed as the Vice President of Network Sports and Client Partnerships at Scripps, starting his new role without delay.

data.title: Viking Global invests $157M in Riot Platforms, betting on crypto with bullish outlook. Miner stocks seen as leverage on Bitcoin.
data.description: Andreas Halvorsen's Viking Global recently made a significant move into the volatile world of cryptocurrency by initiating a new $157 million position in Riot Platforms Inc (NASDAQ: RIOT) in the fourth quarter of 2025. This bold move indicates the hedge fund's growing confidence in the ongoing crypto bull cycle. Companies like Riot, involved in Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) mining, are seen as risky investments directly tied to Bitcoin's performance. As Bitcoin prices surge, mining firms like Riot experience rapid revenue growth and higher profit margins, often surpassing the gains of the cryptocurrency itself during bullish periods. Viking's substantial investment in Riot reflects their positive outlook on the future potential of crypto prices.

data.title: Global lubricant additives market to grow significantly due to demand in automotive, industrial machinery, marine, and energy sectors driven by advanced technologies.
data.description: The lubricant additives market is experiencing continued growth due to increasing demand for high-performance lubricants in various sectors such as automotive, industrial machinery, marine, and energy. This growth is fueled by advancements in engine technologies, longer drain intervals, and stricter emission standards. The market's expansion is reflected in the rising sales and consumption of lubricant additives, with global sales expected to reach significant numbers in the coming years.

data.title: Global dehydrated meat snacks market to reach USD 3.78B by 2036, with 9.3% CAGR, starting from USD 1.56B in 2026.
data.description: In a recent report by Future Market Insights (FMI), it was revealed that the worldwide dehydrated meat product market reached a value of USD 1,423.0 million in 2025. The market is forecasted to see further growth, with an expected value of USD 1,555.3 million in 2026 and a significant increase to USD 3,784.7 million by 2036, demonstrating a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 9.3%.

data.title: Advance directives market to reach $510.2 billion by 2033 with 15.4% CAGR, driven by global geriatric population surge.
data.description: In Portland, Oregon on February 18, 2026, the market for advance directives is experiencing significant growth. This is primarily driven by an increase in investments in advance care planning, the growing global geriatric population, and a rise in awareness regarding the significance of advance directives. These documents, which are legally binding, permit individuals to outline their preferences for medical treatment in case they become unable to communicate their wishes.

data.title: Cybersecurity software market grows due to rising cyber threats and enterprise security investments, driven by digital transformation.
data.description: The cybersecurity software market is experiencing significant growth due to the increasing number of cyberattacks, such as ransomware, phishing, and advanced persistent threats targeting businesses and governments. This growth is fueled by the quick advancement of digital transformation, extensive adoption of cloud services, and the shift towards remote work. This trend has led to a surge in demand for cybersecurity solutions, with the market expected to reach a value of around $200 billion by the end of this year. The necessity for robust security measures to combat evolving cyber threats has become crucial for organizations globally, driving the expansion of the cybersecurity software sector.

data.title: Ultra Maritime in Braintree, Mass, wins contract for new acoustic device to counter adversary torpedo tech.
data.description: In Braintree, Massachusetts on February 18, 2026, there is a significant evolution occurring in adversary torpedo technology that is reshaping undersea warfare. The enhanced torpedoes are becoming increasingly intelligent, stealthier, and deadlier, surpassing conventional decoys. These advanced torpedoes possess the ability to outmaneuver traditional defenses and have remarkable target re-acquisition capabilities, marking a significant shift in undersea battle tactics.

data.title: Inventor from Palmdale, Calif. creates N' DOORS HORSE RACING board game inspired by horse racing.
data.description: In a recent announcement from Pittsburgh on February 18, 2026, an inventor from Palmdale, California shared their inspiration behind creating the innovative N' DOORS HORSE RACING board game. The inventor expressed nostalgia for racetracks and desired to capture the thrill of horse racing in a new way. The game aims to provide entertainment and excitement to players, introducing a fresh perspective on the traditional racing experience. This new invention has the potential to offer a unique gaming experience, bridging the gap between traditional horse racing and board games for enthusiasts.

data.title: Consumers Energy reports 2,700 electric reliability improvements funded by 80% of customer rate increases over 5 years.
data.description: Consumers Energy in Jackson, Michigan reported that 80% of customer rate increases in the last five years have been allocated towards enhancing reliability. They highlighted significant progress in grid improvements throughout 2025, with numerous projects completed statewide to bolster the infrastructure. These efforts have led to a more robust system that benefits consumers across Michigan.

data.title: XRP Ledger launches Members-Only Bank Exchange, but XRP struggles under $1.50. XLS-81 allows gated trading venues for institutions. XRP fails to gain momentum, membership is for approved participants only. XRPL activated XLS-85 Token Escrow for all trustline-based tokens.
data.description: XRP Ledger has implemented the XLS-81 "Permissioned DEX" amendment, providing gated trading venues for regulated institutions. This feature allows approved participants to trade on a controlled version of XRPL's decentralized exchange. Access is restricted to institutions meeting compliance requirements, primarily targeting banks and brokers needing blockchain-based settlement and liquidity without interacting with fully open DeFi markets. Last week, XRP activated the XLS-85 Token Escrow, expanding native escrow functionality to trustline-based tokens like stablecoins and tokenized real-world assets. Despite these updates, XRP is struggling to regain momentum. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.
